positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a group of friendly, anthropomorphic forest animals (fox, deer, bear, owl) gathering in a vibrant autumn forest clearing. They are engaged in a picnic, with baskets, stylized apples, and glowing mushrooms scattered on the forest floor. The composition should be a central, symmetrical scene with clear silhouettes against a deep, moody sky. Utilize a rich color palette of burnt orange, deep teal, mustard yellow, and forest green. The art style should be highly detailed, vector-illustration quality, reminiscent of modern children's book storybook art, clean lines, and solid color blocking, suitable for printing on t-shirts or posters. Studio lighting, high contrast, perfect symmetry, flat graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, noisy, low quality, messy, photorealistic, grayscale
